data.title: Validate output format compatibility for snapshot, screenshot, and console
data.description:
## Description
Validate the output format of @playwright/cli snapshot, screenshot, and console commands for compatibility with DSO skill consumption.

Steps:
1. Run npx @playwright/cli snapshot on a test page — verify output contains structured accessibility tree
2. Run npx @playwright/cli screenshot --output=<path> — verify file is saved to specified path
3. Run npx @playwright/cli console on a test page — verify output contains structured message format
4. Document output structure for each command type

Note: Tasks 3, 4, 5 must run sequentially (not in parallel) to avoid Chromium session conflicts.

## File Impact
- tests/scripts/test-playwright-cli-validation.sh (EDIT — update output format tests)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Snapshot output format test passes
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-playwright-cli-validation.sh 2>&1 | grep "test_output_format_snapshot" | grep -q "PASS"
- [ ] Screenshot output format test passes
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-playwright-cli-validation.sh 2>&1 | grep "test_output_format_screenshot" | grep -q "PASS"
- [ ] Console output format test passes
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-playwright-cli-validation.sh 2>&1 | grep "test_output_format_console" | grep -q "PASS"
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
